        <h1>
            CARNIVORE DIET 
            <span class="sub-indicator">Grocery List</span>
        </h1>
    </header>

    <div class="content">
        
        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Meats</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Red Meat</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Beef (steak, ground beef, roasts, ribs)</li>
                <li>Lamb (chops, ground lamb, leg of lamb)</li>
                <li>Pork (pork chops, pork shoulder, bacon, ribs)</li>
                <li>Venison (steaks, ground venison)</li>
                <li>Bison (steaks, ground bison)</li>
                <li>Goat (goat chops, stew meat)</li>
            </ul>

            <div class="sub-category">Poultry</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Chicken (whole chicken, thighs, breasts, wings)</li>
                <li>Turkey (whole turkey, ground turkey, turkey breast)</li>
                <li>Duck (whole duck, duck breast)</li>
                <li>Quail (whole quail)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Organ Meats</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Variety Meats</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Liver (beef, chicken, lamb, pork)</li>
                <li>Kidney (beef, lamb)</li>
                <li>Heart (beef, chicken, lamb)</li>
                <li>Brain (beef, lamb)</li>
                <li>Tongue (beef, pork)</li>
                <li>Bone marrow (beef marrow bones)</li>
                <li>Sweetbreads (thymus or pancreas of lamb or calf)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Dairy (If Tolerated)</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Dairy Products</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Butter (unsalted, grass-fed if possible)</li>
                <li>Heavy cream (full-fat, no additives)</li>
                <li>Cheese (aged cheeses like cheddar, parmesan, gouda)</li>
                <li>Cream cheese (full-fat, no additives)</li>
                <li>Greek yogurt (full-fat, plain, no added sugar)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Eggs</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Eggs</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Chicken eggs (whole, pasture-raised)</li>
                <li>Duck eggs</li>
                <li>Quail eggs</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Seafood</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Fish</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Salmon (wild-caught, fillets, steaks)</li>
                <li>Tuna (fresh or canned in water/oil)</li>
                <li>Mackerel</li>
                <li>Sardines (fresh or canned in water/oil)</li>
                <li>Cod</li>
                <li>Haddock</li>
                <li>Trout</li>
            </ul>
            <div class="sub-category">Shellfish</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Shrimp</li>
                <li>Crab</li>
				<li>Lobster</li>
                <li>Scallops</li>
                <li>Oysters</li>
				<li>Mussels</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Bone Broth & Gelatin</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Bone Broth & Gelatin</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Bone broth (beef, chicken, pork; without additives)</li>
                <li>Gelatin powder (unflavored, from grass-fed sources)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Processed Meats</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Processed Meats</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Bacon (sugar-free, nitrate-free)</li>
                <li>Sausages (sugar-free, additive-free)</li>
                <li>Deli meats (roast beef, turkey breast, chicken breast, additive-free)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Fats</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Animal Fats</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Beef tallow</li>
                <li>Pork lard</li>
                <li>Duck fat</li>
                <li>Chicken fat (schmaltz)</li>
                <li>Ghee (clarified butter)</li>
                <li>Butter (unsalted, grass-fed if possible)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Supplements (If Needed)</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Carnivore Diet Supplements</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Electrolytes (sodium, potassium, magnesium supplements if needed)</li>
                <li>Vitamin D3 (if not getting sufficient sunlight)</li>
                <li>Omega-3 fish oil (if not consuming fatty fish regularly)</li>
                <li>Collagen peptides or protein (from grass-fed sources)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Seasonings</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Minimal Seasonings</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Salt (preferably sea salt or Himalayan pink salt)</li>
                <li>Pepper (if tolerated)</li>
                <li>Herbs (limited use: fresh rosemary, thyme, oregano)</li>
                <li>Spices (limited use: garlic, onion powder)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

        <section>
            <div class="category-title">Miscellaneous</div>
            <div class="sub-category">Carnivore Items</div>
            <ul>
                <li>Pork rinds (unseasoned, no additives)</li>
                <li>Liver pate (made from pure liver, no added sugars or fillers)</li>
                <li>Beef jerky (sugar-free, nitrate-free)</li>
                <li>Fish roe (caviar, salmon roe)</li>
            </ul>
        </section>

    </div>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Low Phosphorus Diet Guide</title>
    <style>
        /* PDF Page Setup for WeasyPrint */

<body>

<div class="container">
    <header>
        <div class="title-area">
            <h1>Low Phosphorus</h1>
            <h2>Diet Guide</h2>
        </div>
        <div class="goal-box">
            GOAL: <i>Limit phosphorus intake to reduce strain on the kidneys and maintain bone and heart health.</i>
        </div>
    </header>

    <div class="content">
        <div class="column col-left">
            <div class="col-header">FOODS TO EAT</div>
            
            <section>
                <h3>1. Fruits</h3>
                <span class="label">BEST CHOICES:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Apples, Berries, Grapes, Peaches, Pineapple, Watermelon, Plums, Cherries, and Tangerines.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Naturally low in phosphorus and rich in antioxidants.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>2. Vegetables</h3>
                <span class="label">BEST CHOICES:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Cabbage, Cauliflower, Cucumbers, Bell Peppers, Lettuce, Carrots, Green Beans, Zucchini, and Onions.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Provide vitamins and fiber without adding excess phosphorus.</div>
                <div class="tip-box"><b>TIP:</b> Boil high-phosphorus vegetables (like potatoes or spinach) to reduce phosphorus content.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>3. Grains & Starches</h3>
                <span class="label">BEST CHOICES:</span>
                <p class="food-list">White Rice, Refined Pasta, Couscous, Cream of Wheat, and White Bread.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Whole grains are nutritious but tend to contain more phosphorus. Choose refined versions instead.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>4. Protein (Low-Phosphorus)</h3>
                <span class="label">BEST CHOICES:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Egg Whites, Chicken or Turkey <i>(Skinless, Small Portions)</i>, Lean Beef or Fish <i>(Limited Amounts)</i>, Unsalted Canned Tuna.</p>
                <span class="label">PLANT-BASED OPTIONS <i>(Moderate Portions)</i>:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Tofu, Chickpeas, Lentils <i>(Small portions)</i>.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Provides necessary protein while minimizing phosphorus load.</div>
            </section>
        </div>

        <div class="column col-right">
            <div class="col-header">FOODS TO AVOID</div>

            <section>
                <h3>1. High-Phosphorus Dairy Products</h3>
                <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Milk, Cheese, Yogurt, Ice Cream, and Cream Soups.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Contain large amounts of phosphorus and calcium that can build up in the blood.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>2. Nuts, Seeds & Legumes</h3>
                <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Almonds, Peanuts, Cashews, Sunflower Seeds, Lentils, Black Beans, and Chickpeas <i>(In large portions)</i>.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> High in organic phosphorus, which is difficult for kidneys to process.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>3. Whole Grains & Bran Cereals</h3>
                <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Bran Flakes, Oatmeal, Granola, Whole-grain bread, Brown Rice, and Whole Wheat Pasta.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Contain higher phosphorus than refined grains.</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>4. Processed & Fast Foods</h3>
                <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Sausages, Hot Dogs, Deli Meats, Frozen Dinners, Instant Noodles, and Snack Bars.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Often contain phosphate additives (used as preservatives and flavor enhancers).</div>
            </section>

            <section>
                <h3>5. Dark Sodas & Drinks</h3>
                <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                <p class="food-list">Cola, Root Beer, Energy Drinks, and Some Flavored Waters.</p>
                <div class="why-box"><b>WHY:</b> Contain phosphorus additives in the form of phosphoric acid.</div>
            </section>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Wedding Planning Checklist</title>
</head>
<style>
    @page {
        margin: 0.4in;
        size: letter;
        background-color: #FFEAED;
    }
    
    * {
        #outline: 2px solid red;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
    }

    body {
        font-family: 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif;
        font-size: 12pt;
        line-height: 1.4;
        height: 100%;
        color: #000;
    }

    h1 {
        font-family: 'Z003';
        font-size: 36pt;
        line-height: 0.93;
        text-align: center;
        font-weight: bold;
        background-color: #FFF;
        padding: 10px 160px 0;
        letter-spacing: 3px;
    }

    h2 {
        font-size: 13pt;
        background-color: #FFEAED;
        border-top: 2px solid #FFD1D7;
        border-bottom: 2px solid #FFD1D7;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .section {
        background-color: #FFF;
    }

    .section.vendors ul {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0;
    }

    .section.vendors ul li {
        flex-grow: 0;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        flex-basis: 25%;
    }

    /* Every first item of a “row” becomes 50% */
    .section.vendors ul li:nth-child(3n+1) {
        flex-basis: 50%;
    }

    .section.details-design ul,
    .section.fashion-beauty ul,
    .section.attire-fittings ul,
    .section.stationery ul,
    .section.vows-ceremony ul {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0;
    }

    .section.details-design ul li,
    .section.fashion-beauty ul li,
    .section.attire-fittings ul li,
    .section.stationery ul li,
    .section.vows-ceremony ul li {
        flex: 0 0 50%;
    }

    ul {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0 16px;
    }

    li {
        margin: 0;
        line-height: 1.12;
        font-size: 16px;
    }

    li::before {
        content: '\25CB';
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 26px;
        width: 20px;
        margin-left: -16px;
        vertical-align: baseline;
        position: relative;
        top: 2px;
    }

    .timeline {
        font-weight: bold;
        font-size: 18pt;
        text-align: center;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        padding: 5px 0;
        background-color: #FFF;
    }

        padding-top: 10px;
        height: 4px;
        background-color: #FFF;

        height: 4px;
        background-color: #FFD1D7;

<body>

<h1>Wedding Planning Checklist</h1>

<div class="line-container">
    <div class="line"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">12–18 Months Before</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Vision + Budget</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Define your wedding vision: theme, size, vibe, and location (local or destination).</li>
        <li>Set your total budget and prioritize spending (venue, food, dress, photography).</li>
        <li>Create a shared Google Sheet or Notion workspace for planning.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Guest List + Date</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Draft your preliminary guest list.</li>
        <li>Choose potential wedding dates and check with key guests/family.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Venue + Planner</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Research and visit venues (ceremony and reception).</li>
        <li>Book your venue early – this often determines your date.</li>
        <li>Consider hiring a wedding planner or coordinator (full-service or day-of).</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section vendors">
    <h2>Vendors</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Photographer & Videographer</li>
        <li>Caterer</li>
        <li>Hair & Makeup Artist</li>
        <li>Decor/Styling Team</li>
        <li>DJ or Band</li>
        <li>Florist</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="line-container">
    <div class="line"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">9–12 Months Before</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Bridal Party + Attire</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Choose your bridal party (maid of honor, best man, bridesmaids, groomsmen).</li>
        <li>Begin shopping for wedding dress/outfit – allow time for fittings and alterations.</li>
        <li>Research attire for bridesmaids, groomsmen, and parents.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Vendors (Book Key Ones)</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Book photographer, videographer, caterer, and entertainment.</li>
        <li>Hire florist, décor stylist, or event designer.</li>
        <li>Reserve officiant.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section accommodation">
    <h2>Accommodation</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Reserve hotel room blocks for guests (especially for destination weddings).</li>
        <li>Plan transportation if venues are far apart.</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="section details-design">
<div class="line-container line-6-9"">
    <div class="line"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">6–9 Months Before</div>
    <h2>Details + Design</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Order save-the-dates and send them out.</li>
        <li>Finalize menu options and schedule tastings.</li>
        <li>Choose color palette, flowers, and décor theme.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section fashion-beauty">
    <h2>Fashion & Beauty</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Choose bridal shoes and accessories.</li>
        <li>Book hair and makeup artists for trials.</li>
        <li>Begin skincare/haircare prep routines.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Wedding Website</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Create a wedding website with RSVP, travel info, dress code, and registry details.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Entertainment & Extras</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Book any extras like a photo booth, fireworks, or live performers.</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="line-container">
    <div class="line"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">4–6 Months Before</div>
<div class="section attire-fittings">
    <h2>Attire & Fittings</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Schedule your first dress fitting.</li>
        <li>Select groom and groomsmen outfits.</li>
        <li>Finalize bridesmaids' dresses and accessories.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section stationery">
    <h2>Stationery</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Design and order invitations.</li>
        <li>Order ceremony programs, menus, and place cards.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section vows-ceremony">
    <h2>Vows & Ceremony</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Begin writing your vows.</li>
        <li>Finalize your ceremony structure and readings.</li>
        <li>Confirm details with your officiant.</li>
    </ul>
</div>
<div class="section">
    <h2>Registry</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Finalize your gift registry (or honeymoon fund).</li>
    </ul>
</div>

<div class="line-container">
    <div class="line"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">2–4 Months Before</div>
<div class="section final-details">
    <h2>Final Details</h2>
    <ul>
        <li>Send wedding invitations (8–10 weeks before the date).</li>
        <li>Finalize menu and drink selections.</li>
        <li>Confirm floral arrangements and décor setup.</li>
        <li>Create a wedding day timeline (from prep to last dance).</li>
    </ul>
</div>

</body>
</html>

    <body>
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <h1>Zero Carb</h1>
                <h2>Diet Guide</h2>
                <div class="goal-box">GOAL: <i> Eliminate carbohydrates to promote fat burning, stabilize blood sugar, and reduce inflammation.</i>
                </div>
                <div class="note-box">NOTE: <i> Most "zero-carb" foods actually have trace carbs (under 1g per serving), but they're generally considered carb-free for practical purposes.</i>
                </div>
            </header>
            <div class="content">
                <div class="column col-left">
                    <div class="col-header">FOODS TO EAT</div>
                    <div class="sections-container">
                        <section>
                            <h3>1. MEAT AND POULTRY</h3>
                            <span class="label">Allowed:</span>
                            <p class="food-list"> BEEF (STEAK, GROUND BEEF, RIBS), LAMB, PORK (CHOPS, BACON, HAM), VEAL, VENISON, CHICKEN, TURKEY, DUCK, AND GOOSE.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> 100% protein and fat – zero carbs naturally.
                            </div>
                            <div class="tip-box">
                                <b>TIP:</b> Choose unprocessed meats <i>(avoid glazed, breaded, or cured with sugar)</i>.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>2. FISH & SEAFOOD</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list"> SALMON, SARDINES, MACKEREL, TUNA, TROUT, HADDOCK, COD, HALIBUT, SHRIMP, CRAB, LOBSTER, CLAMS, AND SCALLOPS.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Excellent protein and omega-3 sources with zero carbs.
                            </div>
                            <div class="tip-box">
                                <b>TIP:</b> Avoid breaded or battered seafood.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>3. EGGS</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">WHOLE EGGS, EGG WHITES, AND YOLKS — BOILED, SCRAMBLED, POACHED, OR FRIED IN BUTTER.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Virtually zero carbs, nutrient-dense, and easy to digest.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>4. FATS & OILS</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BUTTER, GHEE, LARD, TALLOW, OLIVE OIL, COCONUT OIL, AVOCADO OIL, AND MCT OIL.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Pure fats contain zero carbs and provide energy on low-carb diets.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="column col-right">
                    <div class="col-header">FOODS TO AVOID</div>
                    <div class="sections-container">
                        <section>
                            <h3>1. SUGARY FOODS</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">CANDY, CHOCOLATE, DESSERTS, PASTRIES, CAKES, AND SYRUPS.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> High sugar = high carbs.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>2. GRAINS & STARCHES</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BREAD, PASTA, RICE, OATS, CORN, CEREAL, CRACKERS, AND ANYTHING MADE FROM FLOUR.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Major carb sources.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>3. FRUITS</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">ALL FRUITS (BANANAS, APPLES, BERRIES, MANGOES, PINEAPPLES, ETC.).</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Contain natural sugars (fructose).
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>4. VEGETABLES <i> (EXCEPT LEAFY GREENS, IF STRICTLY ZERO)</i>
                            </h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">POTATOES, SWEET POTATOES, CARROTS, PEAS, BEANS, CORN, AND ANY STARCHY VEGETABLES.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Contain moderate to high carbs.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>5. LEGUMES</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BEANS, LENTILS, CHICKPEAS, PEANUTS, AND SOY PRODUCTS (UNLESS MINIMAL-CARB VERSIONS).</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> High in carbohydrates.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

                font-weight: bold;
                color: #1a5d3b;
                font-size: 10pt;
            }

            .goal-box,
            .note-box {
                top: 73pt;
                height: 40pt;
            }

                position: absolute;
                left: 36pt;
                width: 250.25pt;
            }

            .note-box {
                position: absolute;
                left: 314pt;
                width: 258pt;
            }

                position: absolute;
                top: 117pt;
                left: 0;
                width: 595.5pt;

                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                left: 0;
                width: 306pt;
                background-color: #e8f5e9;
            }

                position: absolute;
                top: 0;
                left: 306pt;
                width: 306pt;
                background-color: #fce4ec;
                border-left: 1.5pt solid #333;
            }

            .col-header {
                padding: 3.5pt;
                text-align: center;
                font-size: 18pt;
                font-weight: bold;
                color: white;
            }

            .col-left .col-header {
                background-color: #388e3c;
            }

            .col-right .col-header {
                background-color: #d32f2f;
            }

            .sections-container {
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                justify-content: space-between;
                height: 644pt;
                padding-bottom: 36pt;
            }

            .sections-container section {
                position: relative;
                width: 100%;
            }

            .label,
            .food-list,
            .why-box,
            .tip-box {
                padding-left: 36pt;
                padding-right: 60pt;
            }

            h3 {
                text-align: center;
                font-size: 12pt;
                background-color: #fff;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                border-bottom: 1.125pt solid #ccc;
                padding: 2pt 0;
                padding-right: 26.25pt;
                padding-left: 18.75pt;
            }

            .label {
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-weight: bold;
                display: block;
                margin-top: 3.5pt;
            }

            .col-left .label {
                color: #2e7d32;
            }

            .col-right .label {
                color: #c62828;
            }

            .food-list {
                font-weight: bold;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-size: 11.25pt;
                margin-top: 3.5pt;
            }

            .why-box {
                font-style: italic;
                font-size: 10.875pt;
                margin-top: 7pt;
            }

            .tip-box {
                font-size: 10.875pt;
                margin-top: 7pt;
            }

            .tip-box b {
                color: #388e3c;
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body>
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <h1>Zero Carb</h1>
                <h2>Diet Guide</h2>
                <div class="goal-box">GOAL: <i> Eliminate carbohydrates to promote fat burning, stabilize blood sugar, and reduce inflammation.</i>
                </div>
                <div class="note-box">NOTE: <i> Most "zero-carb" foods actually have trace carbs (under 1g per serving), but they're generally considered carb-free for practical purposes.</i>
                </div>
            </header>
            <div class="content">
                <div class="column col-left">
                    <div class="col-header">FOODS TO EAT</div>
                    <div class="sections-container">
                        <section>
                            <h3>1. MEAT AND POULTRY</h3>
                            <span class="label">Allowed:</span>
                            <p class="food-list"> BEEF (STEAK, GROUND BEEF, RIBS), LAMB, PORK (CHOPS, BACON, HAM), VEAL, VENISON, CHICKEN, TURKEY, DUCK, AND GOOSE.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> 100% protein and fat – zero carbs naturally.
                            </div>
                            <div class="tip-box">
                                <b>TIP:</b> Choose unprocessed meats <i>(avoid glazed, breaded, or cured with sugar)</i>.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>2. FISH & SEAFOOD</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list"> SALMON, SARDINES, MACKEREL, TUNA, TROUT, HADDOCK, COD, HALIBUT, SHRIMP, CRAB, LOBSTER, CLAMS, AND SCALLOPS.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Excellent protein and omega-3 sources with zero carbs.
                            </div>
                            <div class="tip-box">
                                <b>TIP:</b> Avoid breaded or battered seafood.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>3. EGGS</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">WHOLE EGGS, EGG WHITES, AND YOLKS — BOILED, SCRAMBLED, POACHED, OR FRIED IN BUTTER.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Virtually zero carbs, nutrient-dense, and easy to digest.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>4. FATS & OILS</h3>
                            <span class="label">ALLOWED:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BUTTER, GHEE, LARD, TALLOW, OLIVE OIL, COCONUT OIL, AVOCADO OIL, AND MCT OIL.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Pure fats contain zero carbs and provide energy on low-carb diets.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="column col-right">
                    <div class="col-header">FOODS TO AVOID</div>
                    <div class="sections-container">
                        <section>
                            <h3>1. SUGARY FOODS</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">CANDY, CHOCOLATE, DESSERTS, PASTRIES, CAKES, AND SYRUPS.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> High sugar = high carbs.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>2. GRAINS & STARCHES</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BREAD, PASTA, RICE, OATS, CORN, CEREAL, CRACKERS, AND ANYTHING MADE FROM FLOUR.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Major carb sources.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>3. FRUITS</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">ALL FRUITS (BANANAS, APPLES, BERRIES, MANGOES, PINEAPPLES, ETC.).</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Contain natural sugars (fructose).
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>4. VEGETABLES <i> (EXCEPT LEAFY GREENS, IF STRICTLY ZERO)</i>
                            </h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">POTATOES, SWEET POTATOES, CARROTS, PEAS, BEANS, CORN, AND ANY STARCHY VEGETABLES.</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> Contain moderate to high carbs.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                        <section>
                            <h3>5. LEGUMES</h3>
                            <span class="label">AVOID:</span>
                            <p class="food-list">BEANS, LENTILS, CHICKPEAS, PEANUTS, AND SOY PRODUCTS (UNLESS MINIMAL-CARB VERSIONS).</p>
                            <div class="why-box">
                                <b>WHY:</b> High in carbohydrates.
                            </div>
                        </section>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </body>
</html>

                    <div class="section-title">Snacks:</div> Candy <br> Crackers <br> Chips <br> Cookies <br> Syrups <br> Jelly <br> Jam <br> Donuts <br> Corn Chips <br> Tortilla Chips <br> Pretzels <br> Jelly Beans <br> Rice Crackers <br> Pastries <br> Cakes <br> Nutrigrain Bars <br> Pop Tarts

            border-collapse: collapse;

            height: 30pt;

                            <li>Ghee (clarified butter)</li>
                            <li>Butter (unsalted, grass-fed if possible)</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                    <section>
                        <h2>Supplements (if needed)</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li class="sub">Carnivore diet supplements</li>
                            <li>Electrolytes (sodium, potassium, magnesium supplements if needed)</li>
                            <li>Vitamin D3 (if not getting sufficient sunlight)</li>
                            <li>Omega-3 fish oil (if not consuming fatty fish regularly)</li>
                            <li>Collagen peptides or protein (from grass-fed sources)</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                    <section>
                        <h2>Seasonings</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li class="sub">Minimal seasonings</li>
                            <li>Salt (preferably sea salt or himalayan pink salt)</li>
                            <li>Pepper (if tolerated)</li>
                            <li>Herbs (limited use: fresh rosemary, thyme, oregano)</li>
                            <li>Spices (limited use: garlic, onion powder)</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                    <section>
                        <h2>Miscellaneous</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li class="sub">Carnivore items</li>
                            <li>Pork rinds (unseasoned, no additives)</li>
                            <li>Liver pate (made from pure liver, no added sugars or fillers)</li>
                            <li>Beef jerky (sugar-free, nitrate-free)</li>
                            <li>Fish roe (caviar, salmon roe)</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

            }

                text-align: center;
                color: #3e7ab0;

                letter-spacing: 3pt;

                height: var(--container-height);
            }

                float: left;
                width: calc(33.33% - 10pt);

            }

            .category:last-child {
                margin-right: 0;
            }

                display: flex;

                justify-content: space-between;
                height: 100%;
            }

            h2 {
                text-transform: uppercase;
                font-weight: bold;
                text-align: left;
                font-size: 12.5pt;

            }

            }

            .icon {
                position: absolute;

        <div class="container">
            <!-- COLUMN 1 -->
            <div class="category">
                <div class="column">
                    <section>
                        <h2 class="left">Foods to Eat</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li class="sub left">Omega-3 Fatty Acids</li>
                            <li>Fatty fish (salmon, mackerel, sardines)</li>
                            <li>Flaxseeds</li>
                            <li>Chia seeds</li>
                            <li>Walnuts</li>
                            <li class="sub left">Protein-Rich Foods</li>
                            <li>Lean meats (chicken, turkey)</li>
                            <li>Eggs</li>
                            <li>Beans and legumes</li>
                            <li>Nuts and seeds</li>
                            <li>Tofu</li>
                            <li class="sub left">Complex Carbohydrates</li>
                            <li>Whole grains (brown rice, quinoa, oats)</li>
                            <li>Fruits (especially berries, apples, oranges)</li>
                            <li>Vegetables (leafy greens, broccoli, carrots)</li>
                            <li>Sweet potatoes</li>
                            <li class="sub left">Antioxidant-Rich Foods</li>
                            <li>Berries (blueberries, strawberries, raspberries)</li>
                            <li>Dark leafy greens (spinach, kale)</li>
                            <li>Colorful vegetables (bell peppers, tomatoes)</li>
                            <li>Green tea</li>
                            <li>Dark chocolate (in moderation)</li>
                            <li class="sub left">Foods High in Zinc and Magnesium</li>
                            <li>Pumpkin seeds</li>
                            <li>Chickpeas</li>
                            <li>Lentils</li>
                            <li>Cashews</li>
                            <li>Spinach</li>
                            <li class="sub left">Water and Hydrating Beverages</li>
                            <li>Water</li>
                            <li>Herbal teas</li>
                            <li>Coconut water</li>
                            <li>Fruit-infused water</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                </div>
            </div>
            <!-- COLUMN 2 -->
            <div class="category">
                <div class="column">
                    <section>
                        <h2 class="right">Foods to Avoid</h2>
                        <ul>
                            <li class="sub right">Processed Foods and Sugary Snacks</li>
                            <li>Candy</li>
                            <li>Soda</li>
                            <li>Packaged snacks (chips, cookies)</li>
                            <li>Sugary cereals</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Highly Refined Carbohydrates</li>
                            <li>White bread</li>
                            <li>White rice</li>
                            <li>Pastries</li>
                            <li>Sugary breakfast cereals</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Artificial Food Additives and Preservatives</li>
                            <li>Artificial colors (found in many processed foods and beverages)</li>
                            <li>Artificial flavors</li>
                            <li>MSG (monosodium glutamate)</li>
                            <li>Aspartame</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Highly Processed Meats</li>
                            <li>Hot dogs</li>
                            <li>Bacon</li>
                            <li>Sausages</li>
                            <li>Processed deli meats</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Caffeinated Beverages</li>
                            <li>Coffee</li>
                            <li>Energy drinks</li>
                            <li>Excessive amounts of black tea</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Highly Allergenic Foods</li>
                            <li>Gluten, dairy, or food additives (if applicable)</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Fast Food and Fried Foods</li>
                            <li>Fast food meals high in unhealthy fats and sodium</li>
                            <li>Fried foods (French fries, fried chicken)</li>
                            <li class="sub right">Alcohol</li>
                            <li>Alcoholic beverages should be limited or avoided because they disrupt sleep and worsen symptoms.</li>
                        </ul>
                    </section>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </body>

            }

            ul {
                list-style: none;
                display: flex;
                flex-direction: column;
                justify-content: space-between;
                height: 636.5pt;
            }

                position: relative;
                #text-transform: uppercase;
                line-height: var(--li-line-height);

                font-weight: bold;
                font-size: 11.5pt;
                #height: calc(var(--li-line-height) * 1em);
                min-height: calc(var(--li-line-height) * 1em);
                height: auto;
            }

            li::before {
                content: "";
                position: absolute;
                left: 2pt;
                top: 6pt;
                width: 2pt;
                height: 2pt;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: #000;
                border: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            li.sub {
                list-style: none;
                font-weight: bold;
                text-align: center;
                font-size: 10pt;
                text-transform: uppercase;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <style>
            @page {
                size: a4;
                margin: 36pt;
            }

            * {
                margin: 0;
                padding: 0;
                box-sizing: border-box;
                #outline: 0.8pt solid red;
            }

            html,
            body {
                font-family: "Liberation Sans", sans-serif;
                color: #333;
            }

            h1 {
                #font-family: "Z003", cursive, serif;
                letter-spacing: 2pt;
                font-weight: bold;
                font-size: 23.2pt;
                text-transform: uppercase;
            }

            header {
                display: flex;
                justify-content: space-between;
                margin: 0 0 10pt;
            }

            .week-label {
                text-align: center;
                width: 90pt;
                font-size: 16pt;
                font-weight: bold;
            }

            .week-line {
                margin: 16pt 0 0;
                border-bottom: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            table {
                width: 100%;
                border-collapse: collapse;
                table-layout: fixed;
                border-bottom: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            th,
            td {
                padding: 4.89pt 0;
                text-align: center;
                border-bottom: 0.6pt solid #e6e6e6;
                border-right: 0.99pt solid #ccc;
            }

            thead th {
                font-size: 10pt;
                font-weight: bold;
                text-transform: uppercase;
                background-color: #fff;
                border: none;
                border-bottom: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            .time-col {
                background-color: #c8e5ec;
                font-size: 8pt;
                font-weight: bold;
                border-left: 1pt solid #000;
                border-right: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            .last-col {
                border-right: 1pt solid #000;
            }

            .mon {
                background-color: #fff4f4;
            }

            .tue {
                background-color: #fff9f2;
            }

            .wed {
                background-color: #fdfdf2;
            }

            .thu {
                background-color: #f2fdf2;
            }

            .fri {
                background-color: #f2f9fd;
            }

            .sat {
                background-color: #f7f2fd;
            }

            .sun {
                background-color: #ffffff;
            }

            thead th:first-child {
                width: 50pt;
            }
            
            tbody tr:nth-child(n) .time-col {
                border-bottom: 0.6pt solid #ccc;
                #border-bottom: none;
            }

            tbody tr:nth-child(2n) .time-col {
                border-bottom: 0.99pt solid #000;
            }

            tbody tr:nth-child(2n) td:not(:first-child) {
                border-bottom: 0.99pt solid #ccc;
